heading: Review of accounts
label: 5524 Review of accounts
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 3074, , .Sept. 26, 1961Pub. L. 87–304, § 475 Stat. 663Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 3074, , .Sept. 26, 1961Pub. L. 87–304, § 475 Stat. 663Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.text: the review of the account of each employee of the agency in receipt of payments under section 5522 or 5523 of this title, or both, as the case may be; and

children.label: A
children.text: the rates of pay, allowances, and differentials to which the employee would have been entitled under applicable statute other than this subchapter for the respective periods covered by the payments, if he had performed active service under the terms of his appointment during each period in the position he held immediately before the issuance of the applicable evacuation order; and

children.label: B
children.text: such additional amounts as the employee is authorized to receive in accordance with a determination of the President under .section 5523(b) of this title
